## LibraryData.resolveImportRootForLibrary() function

Resolves a directory that can be treated as a library root for any sub-libraries.

The returned directory is guaranteed (if successful) to contain a navigable `data/` directory with at least one standard sub-library directory (ingredients, fillings, etc.).

This is intended to unify import behavior across zip, filesystem, and in-memory sources when importing a full library rather than a specific sub-library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveImportRootForLibrary(root: FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem, options?: Omit<IResolveImportRootOptions, 'allowLooseFiles'>): Result<IResolvedImportRoot>;
```
